feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Update / Upload MSME Details for a Vendor(BP)
entry.content:
Hello,

ExpertsI'm Developing an Upload Program for BP(Vendor & Customer ) Tcode

But I'm stuck in between while Uploading MSME Details under FLVN00 vendor

Can you anyone Help me out!!!

entry.title: Creating Custom BO with upload function like 'Import Supplier Invoices' App in S4hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to create a custom business object with upload function like Import Supplier Invoices App in S4Hana Cloud system.

Is it possible to create that kind of custom business object using Key User (In App) Extensibility or Developer (On Stack) Extensibility using ADT?

Or any workaround exist?

Could you please provide any idea?

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Return a search help value list
entry.content:
Hi all,

I used the following FM to return a search help value list but looks like only 1 field in the code is supported. Can I get multi fields/columns of lt_hu displayed in the value help return list? Besides, other fields are not UI (dynpro) fields.

Regards,
Ming

entry.title: Accessing Excel from SAP Fiori Web Environment
entry.content:
I'm facing an issue with accessing Excel from a SAP Fiori web environment. While executing a program that utilizes OLE2 in SAP GUI, everything runs smoothly. However, when attempting to run the same program in Fiori, it fails due to lack of access permissions to Excel from the web interface.

It seems that the security restrictions in a web environment like Fiori prevent direct interactions with external applications like Excel via OLE2. As a result, users are unable to utilize Excel functionalities within Fiori.

What are the best practices or workarounds for enabling access to Excel from Fiori? Is there a way to overcome these permission restrictions or are there alternative methods to achieve similar functionalities within a web environment like Fiori?

I appreciate any insights or recommendations on how to address this issue effectively. Thank you.

entry.title: Custom Selection Screen of IP17/IP18 tcodes
entry.content:
I'm unable to find any BADI/Exit/Strucutre to add new custom fields in the selection criteria of IP17/IP18 tcodes.

I want to add new custom field in the above highlighted Block.

 

Please let me know which BADI/Exit/Strucutre can be used to add new custom fields in the selection criteria of IP17/IP18 tcodes.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How can I add Internal Price at item level to outbound ORDERS05 (Sales Order) IDoc?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to send internal price at item level to outbound ORDERS05 (Sales Order) IDoc.

I see that Internal price is marked for Statistics.

How could I achieve this?

Regards,

Minh

entry.title: How to create OVS with custom BO in ADT?
entry.content: I create custom BO and want to use this custom BO as OVS field in another custom BO in ADT.

entry.title: What is the difference between "tables:X" and "ls_str TYPE X"?
entry.content:
Hi Masters,


When I define TABLES:zpp_t0045, I create a structure. When I define "ls_str TYPE zpp_t0045", I create a structure. What is the difference between them?

If there is no difference, instead of making a long definition of "ls_str TYPE zpp_t0045", you can simply write "TABLES: zpp_t0045" and continue ?

 

thanks

entry.title: Difference between database view and table
entry.content:
Hello,

we are facing an S4Hana migration and in our Quality systems showed up a very strange issue, in the view NSDM_MIG_MSSL when I search for one material the values are different from table MSSL where the view takes the table from.

Why could be this happen since as far as I know the view is not a different table. 

I am missing something?

entry.title: Select statement with all keys in where condition
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a req to read the data from one table(tab1) and it has 2 IO as a keyfields. PFB screenshot.

In the above tables, we have 5200 entries with one unique value on key field1 and 5200 distinct values. 

I have a requirement to select data from the above table, but in the where condition i am able to pass only one value and since other key field has distinct values, not sure how to give these values in the where condition. 

My concern is since the select statement where condition has only one key field and table has 2 keyfields, hence the select statement will not hit table based on primary index, instead it will do linear search. 

So my question is, do we have any option to pass keyfield2 which has to read all the data, so that it will hit the primary index in the select statement. 

Note : I don't have option to create secondary index.

entry.title: ATC Central Remote Server - Roadmap
entry.content:
Hi fellow developers,

I have a question on the ATC Roadmap in the scenario of a Central Remote Check Setup.

A minumum of NW 7.51/7.52 is required when we must use it for remote checks for say an S/4HANA Readiness assesment. If we look at the roadmap for NW 7.52, its standard support is till the year 2027 after which S/4 Foundation is the successor. However, S/4 Foundation can only be used in conjuction with a license like S/4HANA. 

So my question is, what is the future of the ATC as a remote stand alone system? Are we supposed to move to ATC on BTP if we want such a setup? Or merge it with a system which has S/4HANA?

@OlgaDolinskaja  / @thomas_jung your views would be appreciated here. 

 

Regards,

J.

entry.title: Find Table for SQ01: statistic of Variant Configurator (SO, Characteristic, Values)
entry.content:
Hi, I need to create a Report in SQ01: Enter a Period of time and VC Part Number and get a list of SOs with Characteristics and Values (from Variant Configurator). It would be very useful for our statistic.
A transaction that give me some of required information is CL30N (Find Objects in Classes) - I can extend the layout to display all Characteristics (not only Chars and Values used in Search) and will get a report, where SOs, all Characteristics and Vales are displayed. Unfortunately I cannot set a time limit here to get a list of SOs for e.g. last year. I can not find a table used in the Transaction CL30N with button F1...
I found a SQ01 Report with tables VBAP, VBAK and additional fields Z_CH_NAME and Z_CH_DESC 1 till 18 that is almost what I need, but columns of Characteristics have name "Ch Val 1", "Ch Val 2" etc., not the description from the VC.
Could you please help me to find the solution?

entry.title: EXCEL FILE DATA UPLOAD & VALIDATION.
entry.content:
Hey experts,
I have one Excel sheet and I have to upload data from that sheet In SAP.
So in this case before uploading data in SAP how can I get the message that the data Is mismatched?
& Please help me with the procedure and (code).

entry.title: Table PRCD_ELEMENTS-KWERT not able to fetch complete value
entry.content:
When I run the below query, the KWERT field value getting divided by 100 and resulting value is fetched in  internal table

ex: In table if KWERT = 114,750 then after running the query I am getting KWERT = 1147.50 in internal table.   

 SELECT KNUMV KPOSN KSCHL KWERT KBETR FROM PRCD_ELEMENTS
       INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE IT_PRCD_ELEMENTS
      WHERE KNUMV = LS_EKKO-KNUMV AND
      KSCHL IN ('ZPB0','ZPBX','P101') .

entry.title: Function module or method to query all base members from a BW hierarchy node
entry.content:
Hi. Is there any function module or method to query all children base members from a bw hierarchy? For BPC hierarchy I have the method IF_UJA_DIM_DATA~GET_CHILDREN_MBR, I need something that works like that, but for a pure BW hierarchy.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: Function module or method to query values for a BW authorization variable.
entry.content:
Hi. I need a ABAP function module or method to get the values in a BW characteristic and hierarchy node authorization variable for a user.

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: How to make restriction field read only in search help?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm using F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST to create a search help just like my attached picture.

Now I want to make a restriction field read-only and filled with a given value, which mean this field is always a fixed value and can't be changed/input in the search help. I think that it is just like an import parameter in a standard search help.

Anyone could help?

Regards,
Ming

entry.title: Why data type used for private attribute should be defined in class-relevant local definition?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Just as desribed in the title, why it's no defined in the normal local test definition/implementation?

Regards, Ming

entry.title: How to define Quantity in CDS View Entity
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to use the new feature Define View Entity instead of Define View and not sure how to define a quantity with UOM Semantics. 

Define View will used to have  (Sample)

@Semantics.UnitOfMeasure: true
MEIN as UOM
@Semantics.quantity.unitofmeasure: 'UOM'
KWMENG as OrdQty

 How can I define the same using Define View Entity, I get an error when trying to follow the old syntax. 

Can anyone show a screen shot or how to define it?

Thanks,

Arthur.

entry.title: Add multiple entries to Outbound queue in SMQ1
entry.content:
Greetings all,

In ECC, I implemented the logic that creating an outbound queue ( which can check in tcode SMQ1 or table TRFCQOUT) and triggers the scheduling of a background job for this queue with a 5-munites delay. Upon the re-execution of this logic within the 5-munites, additional entries are appended to this queue name. 

The primary objective of this implementation is to streamline the process by consolidating multiple entries under a single background job. It helps to improve the performance by minimize the number of background job running parallel at the same time. 

Following the example of below sap document, everything is working fine in ECC system.

However, It doesn't working properly in S4 HANA system. Within 5-munite delay time, if this logic was executed again, then this queue name has gone immediately (cannot add a 3rd entry) and the background job is removed (cannot see it in SM37). 

I am still struggling with this issue 😞 and uncertain if there are any configurations for background jobs in S4 Hana system that could provide assistance 

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-us/48/bb8094b22337e3e10000000a42189d/content.htm?loaded_from_frameset=true

 

Here is the logic implementing: 

 

* Get the latest entry of outbound queue into ls_qout (can use FM TRFC_QOUT_OVERVIEW_STATES)
* Based on ls_qout, we can get the start time of the latest queue (ls_qout-ftime)
* in order to know this queue is still deplaying for 5-munite or not 
IF ls_qout IS NOT INITIAL.
  IF ls_qout-ftime + 300 > sy-uzeit. "300 seconds = 5 munites
    lv_qname = ls_qout-qname
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.
 
* Set the new queue name if it cannot find any queue which is still deplaying
* And also set the flag lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'
IF lv_qname IS INITIAL.
  lv_qname = 'assign_the_queue_name'.
  lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'.
ENDIF.
 
* Initializing the TRFC Queue
CALL FUNCTION 'TRFC_QUEUE_INITIALIZE' .
 
* Set the queue name for the outbound queue
 CALL FUNCTION 'TRFC_SET_QUEUE_NAME'
    EXPORTING
      qname  = lv_qname
      nosend = space.
 
* Call tRFC without destination because I need it running locally in this system
 CALL FUNCTION 'rfc_function'
    IN BACKGROUND TASK ...
 
* Schedule the background job starts in next 5 munites for only the first one execution
IF lv_schedule_backgroundjob = 'X'.
        lv_start_date = sy-datum.
        lv_start_time = sy-uzeit + 300.
 
        CALL FUNCTION 'START_OF_BACKGROUNDTASK'
          EXPORTING
            startdate = lv_start_date
            starttime = lv_start_time.
 
ENDIF.
 
* At the time of the COMMIT WORK, the qRFC manager creates a counter for the LUW
  COMMIT WORK.
